description_long: This is a military jet airplane with a sleek, angular fuselage painted in matte gray, featuring red and white insignia and identification markings on the sides. The wings are sharply swept back and mounted low on the fuselage, with visible underwing pylons and external stores. The twin-engine nacelles are integrated into the rear fuselage, with blue exhaust nozzles visible from the rear. The tail section has a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers with a slight anhedral angle. The cockpit is forward-mounted, enclosed with a dark-tinted canopy, and appears to be designed for two crew members in tandem seating. The landing gear is tricycle-type, with the main gear under the wings and a single nose wheel.
description: A gray, swept-wing military jet with twin engines, a forward enclosed cockpit, and tricycle landing gear. Marked with red and white insignia and detailed with underwing pylons and blue exhausts.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the swept-back wings, twin tail stabilizers, and overall planform of the jet.
description_view_1: Left side profile highlighting the forward cockpit, side markings, and the low-mounted swept wings.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the pointed nose, cockpit canopy, and the wide stance of the landing gear.
description_view_3: Right side profile similar to view 1, with visible engine intakes and tail configuration.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, sharply swept wings with slight anhedral angle and underwing pylons; no winglets visible.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines integrated into the rear fuselage with visible exhaust nozzles.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers with slight anhedral.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle retractable landing gear with two main gear units and a single nose gear.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a tandem seating configuration and a dark-tinted canopy.
